name: Brand Lockup
description: Official SUSE logo lockups — chameleon + wordmark + a product, program, or team name, in horizontal or stacked layouts.

inputs.label: Name
inputs.help: The text that follows SUSE — e.g. "Storage", "AI Factory", or "Data Team". Leave blank for the SUSE master logo alone.

inputs.label: Type
inputs.help: Products use the simplest title (e.g. SUSE AI). Programs end in "Program"; teams end in "Team".

inputs.label: Polarity
inputs.help: Positive for light backgrounds; negative for dark backgrounds.

inputs.label: Colour
inputs.help: Full colour keeps the chameleon green; monochrome renders everything one colour (black on light, white on dark).

inputs.label: Name wrapping
inputs.help: Stacked only: how the name wraps under SUSE. Compact stacks each long word onto its own line; wide keeps more words per line.

inputs.label: Background
inputs.help: Transparent matches the brand source files. Set a colour to bake a background panel into the export.
